description: Use this API api for get/set the flag that is used for the subsystem defintion for performing scans for generators for which the speed deviation is more than a specified threshold. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = set_genspdev_subsys_flag(all, sid) ierr, all = set_genspdev_subsys_flag()
python_syntax: ierr = set_genspdev_subsys_flag(all, sid) ierr, all = set_genspdev_subsys_flag()

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
